description.content: Added as a part of security scheme: apikey

The Swetrix Admin API manages analytics projects, funnels, annotations, project views (segments), and organisations. Supports full CRUD operations for all Swetrix account resources. All requests require authentication via the X-Api-Key header. Rate limit is 600 requests/hour.

Contact Support:
 Name: Swetrix Support
